name: 3D-Model-Viewer
description: Build pipeline for the 3D Model Viewer WordPress plugin.

scripts.package-plugin: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/3D-Model-Viewer && git ls-files | while read -r f; do case "$f" in node_modules/*|dist/*|.gitignore|scripts/*) continue ;; esac; mkdir -p "dist/3D-Model-Viewer/$(dirname "$f")"; cp -R "$f" "dist/3D-Model-Viewer/$f"; done && (cd dist && zip -qr 3D-Model-Viewer.zip 3D-Model-Viewer)
